info.title: API Rewrite
info.summary: Référence de l'API Projets (Projets, clés API, modèles, webhooks).
info.description:
Référence publique complète des points de terminaison au niveau projet de l'API Rewrite v1.

Tous les endpoints renvoient une enveloppe cohérente (`ok`, `data` et `cursor` optionnel).
Utilisez soit un jeton Bearer (clé API) avec des scopes, soit une session cookie authentifiée.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Créer, lister et révoquer les clés API du projet.

get.description:
Renvoie les clés API actives du projet avec pagination par curseur.

Utilisez `limit`, `after` et `before` pour paginer.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

api_keys = client.api_keys.list(project_id, {"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$apiKeys = $rewrite->apiKeys->list($projectId, [
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

api_keys = rewrite.api_keys.list(project_id, limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.apiKeys.ListApiKeysOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val apiKeys = rewrite.apiKeys.list(
    projectId,
    ListApiKeysOptions(limit = 20)
  )

  println(apiKeys)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

post.description: Crée une clé API de projet et renvoie le secret une seule fois. Stockez-le de manière sécurisée.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$apiKey = $rewrite->apiKeys->create([
  'project' => $projectId,
  'name' => 'Jobs worker',
  'scopes' => ['project:templates:read', 'projects:webhooks:read'],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

api_key = rewrite.api_keys.create(
  project: project_id,
  name: "Jobs worker",
  scopes: ["project:templates:read", "projects:webhooks:read"]
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.apiKeys.CreateApiKeyOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val apiKey = rewrite.apiKeys.create(
    CreateApiKeyOptions(
      project = projectId,
      name = "Jobs worker",
      scopes = listOf("project:templates:read", "projects:webhooks:read")
    )
  )

  println(apiKey)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

delete.description: Révoque immédiatement une clé API par son identifiant.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"
api_key_id = "748395130237498400"

client.api_keys.delete(api_key_id, project_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';
$apiKeyId = '748395130237498400';

$rewrite->apiKeys->delete($apiKeyId, $projectId);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"
api_key_id = "748395130237498400"

rewrite.api_keys.delete(api_key_id, project_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"
  val apiKeyId = "748395130237498400"

  rewrite.apiKeys.delete(apiKeyId, projectId)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

bearerAuth.description: Envoyez votre clé API via `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`.

after.name: after
after.description: ID de curseur unique pour récupérer les éléments après cette valeur.

before.name: before
before.description: ID de curseur unique pour récupérer les éléments avant cette valeur.

persist.description: Indique si une autre page peut être demandée via `next`.

next.description: Curseur pour demander la page suivante (`after`).

data.description: Aucune donnée n'est renvoyée pour cette réponse.

OkEmptyResponse.description: Réponse réussie. Cet endpoint ne renvoie aucune donnée.

prefix.description: Préfixe de clé publique pour l'identification.

APIKey.description: Métadonnées de clé API du projet (le secret n'est plus renvoyé ensuite).

APIKeyCreateBody.description: Crée une clé API de projet avec des scopes optionnels.

ok.description: Indicates whether the API key was created successfully.

id.description: ID of the newly created API key.

key.description: One-time secret API key value. Store it securely; it will not be shown again.

data.description: Details returned once after API key creation.

APIKeyCreateResponse.description: Réponse de création contenant la clé secrète à usage unique.

AuthScope.description:
Permission scope accepted by API keys. Use scoped permissions whenever possible.

Common values:
- `project:read`
- `project:write`
- `project:api_keys:read`
- `project:templates:read`
- `project:templates:write`
- `projects:webhooks:read`
- `projects:webhooks:write`
- `projects:payments:read`
- `*` (full access)
